nasb.text: And he went out about the third hour and saw others standing idle in the market place;

esv.text: And going out about the third hour he saw others standing idle in the marketplace,

cnv.text: 大約九點鐘，他又出去，看見還有人閒站在街市上，

ccb.text: “大约上午九点钟，园主出去看见一些人站在街市上无所事事，

csbs.text: 大约上午九点，他又出去，看见还有人闲站在街市上，
